matchup: Detroit Pistons at Cleveland Cavaliers - Game 4

model_snapshot_at_entry.primary_read: Cleveland scoring correction path after poor first-half FG% but strong FT volume and three-point attempt rate.
key_drivers: CLE shot only 39.5% FG in first half, leaving positive shotmaking regression path.
CLE attempted 25 threes in first half, confirming volume rather than passive offense.
CLE generated 16 FTA in first half vs DET 5 FTA, indicating whistle pressure.
Detroit committed 13 fouls in first half.
Donovan Mitchell was 1-for-8 at halftime, creating star-regression upside.
risk_flags: Cleveland needs 55 second-half points, so line is not free despite value price.
Detroit led at halftime and can slow possessions if it controls early Q3.
Hot Detroit shooting could force Cleveland pace upward, but also risks Cavs defensive pressure changing rotation/tempo.
